description: LogQL feature showcase: one panel target per logql-feature-inventory.json row, enforced by test/inventory. Panels carry cerberus.expect contracts where the defined outcome is empty or an error.

panels.description: Contains / not-contains line filters over the seeded gateway logfmt stream.
panels.title: Line filters: |= and != chains

panels.description: Regex / negated-regex line filters; the seeded status field flips between 200/404/500.
panels.title: Regex line filters: |~ and !~

panels.description: `|= "a" or "b"` matches lines containing either alternative.
panels.title: or-chained line filter

cerberus.why: The line filter names a needle deliberately absent from every seeded stream, so the DEFINED result is an empty streams set — a bidirectional pin on |= correctness (a non-empty result means the filter stopped filtering).

panels.description: A needle no seeded line carries. The CORRECT output of this query is zero streams; returning any stream means the seed or the filter lowering broke.
panels.title: Impossible line filter — defined empty

panels.description: String equality against the synthesized detected_level label (SeverityText-derived).
panels.title: String label filter on detected_level

panels.description: Numeric comparison on the logfmt-extracted status field.
panels.title: Numeric label filter

panels.description: Duration-typed comparison on the logfmt-extracted took field (Go-duration shape, e.g. 240ms).
panels.title: Duration label filter

panels.description: Byte-size-typed comparison on the logfmt-extracted size field (e.g. 1536B).
panels.title: Bytes label filter

panels.description: Two numeric label filters joined with `and`.
panels.title: Conjunction: and

panels.description: Two string label filters joined with `or`.
panels.title: Disjunction: or

panels.description: Bare JSON parser over the shop stream's structured bodies.
panels.title: | json (bare)

panels.description: Parameterised JSON parser extracting a nested field, then filtering on it.
panels.title: | json with path expressions

panels.description: Bare logfmt parser over the gateway stream's key=value bodies.
panels.title: | logfmt (bare)

panels.description: Parameterised logfmt parser mapping a chosen key to a local name.
panels.title: | logfmt with expressions

panels.description: Pattern parser over the proxy stream's fixed-structure access-log lines.
panels.title: | pattern

panels.description: Regexp parser with a named capture group.
panels.title: | regexp

panels.description: Unpack parser over the packer stream's Loki pack-format bodies ({"_entry": ...}).
panels.title: | unpack

panels.description: Template-rewrites each line from logfmt-extracted fields.
panels.title: | line_format

panels.description: Renames an extracted label (lvl=level).
panels.title: | label_format

panels.description: Strips the painter stream's ANSI colour codes from each line.
panels.title: | decolorize

panels.description: Projects the output label set down (keep) / removes named keys (drop).
panels.title: | keep / | drop

panels.description: Per-stream line rate and line count over a 5m window.
panels.title: rate / count_over_time

panels.description: Byte-volume rate and total over a 5m window.
panels.title: bytes_rate / bytes_over_time

panels.description: Unwrapped-value aggregations over the logfmt-extracted numeric status field.
panels.title: avg / sum / min / max over_time (unwrap)

panels.description: Statistical unwrapped-value aggregations.
panels.title: stddev / stdvar / quantile over_time (unwrap)

panels.description: Unwrap with conversion functions over the took (duration) and size (bytes) fields.
panels.title: unwrap conversions: duration / duration_seconds / bytes

panels.description: Sum-of-values rate (rate + unwrap) and a 1m-offset line count — the rolling re-seeder keeps a ±5m window around now, so the offset window still has data.
panels.title: rate over unwrapped values + offset

panels.description: Grouped vector aggregations over per-stream rates.
panels.title: sum / avg / min / max by (service_name)

panels.description: count without(...) plus statistical aggregations by service.
panels.title: count / stddev / stdvar

panels.description: Ungrouped aggregation collapsing every stream into one series.
panels.title: bare sum (no grouping)

panels.description: Vector-scalar arithmetic over per-stream rates.
panels.title: Arithmetic: + - * /

panels.description: Modulo and power vector-scalar arithmetic.
panels.title: Arithmetic: % and ^

panels.description: Bare comparisons drop samples failing the predicate. The == / != legs run against vector(1), whose constant value makes the predicate deterministically true — the panel's nonempty contract is enforced per target.
panels.title: Comparisons (filter form)

panels.description: bool-modified comparison projects 1/0 instead of filtering.
panels.title: Comparison with bool modifier

panels.description: Vector-vector multiplication joined on / ignoring chosen labels.
panels.title: Vector matching: on / ignoring

panels.description: Many-to-one / one-to-many joins across aggregations with different by-sets.

targets.expr: sum by (service_name, detected_level) (rate({service_name=~".+"}[5m])) * on (service_name) group_left sum by (service_name) (count_over_time({service_name=~".+"}[5m]))
sum by (service_name) (count_over_time({service_name=~".+"}[5m])) * on (service_name) group_right sum by (service_name, detected_level) (rate({service_name=~".+"}[5m]))

panels.title: Vector matching: group_left / group_right

panels.description: Synthetic constant vector.
panels.title: vector()

panels.description: Regex-derives a new label from service_name on an aggregated series set.
panels.title: label_replace

panels.description: Line-filter ip(CIDR) matching is lowered to a ClickHouse CIDR test; gateway logs carry 192.168.1.x remote_addr values so the probe returns matching streams.
panels.title: ip() line filter — implemented

panels.description: Pattern-match line filters (`|>`) are lowered; proxy access-log lines match `<_> /shop/items/<_> <_>` so the probe returns matching streams.
panels.title: |> pattern line filter — implemented

cerberus.why: Negated pattern filter over a stream where every line matches the pattern has a defined-empty result; declared empty so the sweep fails the moment the negation lowering regresses and starts leaking matching lines.

panels.description: Negated pattern-match line filters (`!>`) are lowered; every proxy access-log line matches `<_> /shop/items/<_> <_>`, so negating it excludes all of them — the defined result on this seed is empty.
panels.title: !> pattern line filter — implemented (defined-empty)

panels.description: Label-filter ip(CIDR) matching is lowered to a ClickHouse CIDR test; gateway logfmt remote_addr values include 10.0.0.x so the probe returns matching streams.
panels.title: ip() label filter — implemented

panels.description: first_over_time over unwrapped values is lowered to an over-time range window; the probe returns one sample series per gateway stream.
panels.title: first_over_time — implemented

panels.description: last_over_time over unwrapped values is lowered to an over-time range window; the probe returns one sample series per gateway stream.
panels.title: last_over_time — implemented

panels.description: rate_counter over unwrapped values is lowered to an over-time range window; the probe returns one sample series per gateway stream.
panels.title: rate_counter — implemented

panels.description: absent_over_time is lowered and returns a value-1 series for the missing service `cerberus-showcase-never-logged` (nothing was ever logged under that name), matching reference Loki.
panels.title: absent_over_time — implemented

panels.description: topk(k, …) is lowered via chplan.TopK (per-timestamp top-k that keeps output shape); the probe returns the top series over the rate vector.
panels.title: topk — implemented

panels.description: bottomk(k, …) is lowered via chplan.TopK (per-timestamp bottom-k that keeps output shape); the probe returns the bottom series over the rate vector.
panels.title: bottomk — implemented

panels.description: sort(…) is lowered via chplan.OrderBy (ascending value ordering); the probe returns the per-service rate vector ordered by value.
panels.title: sort — implemented

panels.description: sort_desc(…) is lowered via chplan.OrderBy (descending value ordering); the probe returns the per-service rate vector ordered by value.
panels.title: sort_desc — implemented

cerberus.why: Cerberus rejects this construct today; the declaration is a bidirectional parity pin — the panel FAILS the sweep the moment support lands, forcing the contract (and this dashboard) to be updated alongside the feature.

panels.description: The probabilistic approx_topk aggregation is rejected.
panels.title: approx_topk — parity rejection

panels.description: Logical set op `and` between sample expressions is lowered as a vector set op; `rate(gateway) and rate(gateway)` keeps the gateway series the probe returns.
panels.title: and — implemented

panels.description: Logical set op `or` between sample expressions is lowered as a vector set op; `rate(gateway) or rate(gateway)` returns the gateway series the probe returns.
panels.title: or — implemented

panels.description: Logical set op `unless` between sample expressions is lowered as a vector set op; `rate(gateway) unless rate(db)` keeps the gateway series since no `db` service is seeded.
panels.title: unless — implemented

title: LogQL Showcase
